emails.subject: Re: conoco deals #506549.01, 506550.01, 506551.01
emails.body: Re: conoco deals #506549.01, 506550.01, 506551.01 The contact name is Jack Wells, and his phone number is (281) 293-6030. Would you like me to enter this info into the deals? Kate Kimberly Hundl@ENRON 01/29/2001 08:23 AM

emails.subject: conoco deals #506549.01, 506550.01, 506551.01
emails.body: conoco deals #506549.01, 506550.01, 506551.01 hi kate, these sean crandall deals need contacts. can you please get a good contact name (and phone and i will put in a gcp request to have it added to the drop down list in deal entry. i'm too lazy to press the shift key lately, sorry -no caps. thanks for your help! kim

emails.body: for some reason that contact was inactivated -if that's definitely the contact, i'll have gcp re-activate it. that's strange, i wonder why it was inactivated. just let me know. Kate Symes ECT 01/29/2001 12:16 PM

emails.subject: Re: conoco deals #506549.01, 506550.01, 506551.01
emails.body: Sorry for the slow reaction time this is the contact information Greg Wolfe gave me, and he Sean Crandall confirmed that (he was in the midst of putting a Conoco deal in the system). As for why it was taken out of the GCP system, I have no idea. If you know of anyone around here who would have called for that to be de-activated, let me know. Otherwise, our traders still know Jack Wells as the contact. Hope that helps. Thanks, Kate Kimberly Hundl@ENRON 01/29/2001 11:11 AM
